org.apache.dubbo.common.extension

接口 LoadingStrategy

  • 所有超级接口:
    Comparable<Prioritized>, Prioritized
    所有已知实现类:
    DubboInternalLoadingStrategy, DubboLoadingStrategy, ServicesLoadingStrategy

    public interface LoadingStrategy
extends Prioritized

    • 字段概要

      • 从接口继承的字段 org.apache.dubbo.common.lang.Prioritized

        COMPARATOR, MAX_PRIORITY, MIN_PRIORITY, NORMAL_PRIORITY

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 抽象方法 默认方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      String directory() 
      default String[] excludedPackages() 
      default boolean overridden()
      Indicates current LoadingStrategy supports overriding other lower prioritized instances or not.
      default boolean preferExtensionClassLoader() 

      • 从接口继承的方法 org.apache.dubbo.common.lang.Prioritized

        compareTo, getPriority

    • 方法详细资料

      • directory

        String directory()

      • preferExtensionClassLoader

        default boolean preferExtensionClassLoader()

      • excludedPackages

        default String[] excludedPackages()

      • overridden

        default boolean overridden()
        Indicates current LoadingStrategy supports overriding other lower prioritized instances or not.
        返回:
        if supports, return true, or false
        从以下版本开始:
        2.7.7
